name: Panfish Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Panfish fillets; perch, sunfish, or crappie, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, cook the bacon until crisp. Remove and discard all but 2 tablespoons of drippings.
2. Sauté onion and celery in the remaining drippings until tender.
3. Add the next eight ingredients (carrots, parsley, lemon juice, dill weed, garlic salt, pepper).
4. Simmer until vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
5. Add fish and bacon; simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or just until fish flakes with a fork.
6. Stir in cream and heat through.
